listings.name: Hilago Ranch
listings.tagline: 2,544 acres of high-fence West Texas ranch land with premier whitetail genetics, two new reservoirs, and a full infrastructure package.
listings.description: Hilago Ranch represents one of the most turnkey high-fence ranches available in West Texas. The 1,977-acre high-fence pasture is stocked with South Texas whitetail deer genetics built over years of intentional management. A separate 485-acre high-fence pasture offers additional potential for exotics or expanded deer operations. Water is exceptional — a 25+ acre reservoir, 11 ponds, multiple water wells, and two newly built reservoirs. Infrastructure includes a foreman's home, guest cabin, large barn, and established road systems throughout. Seller retains all mineral rights.
highlights: 1,977-acre high-fence pasture with South Texas whitetail genetics
Multiple water wells and two newly built reservoirs
Foreman's home, guest cabin, large barn
listings.metaTitle: Hilago Ranch — 2,544 Acres High-Fence Ranch Land for Sale | Stephens County TX | J4 Legacy Properties
listings.metaDescription: 2,544-acre high-fence whitetail ranch in Stephens County, Texas. South Texas genetics, 25+ acre reservoir, 11 ponds, foreman's home, guest cabin. Listed at $18,500,000. J4 Legacy Properties.
